title: UAE weather alert: Rain, dust and strong winds expected next week as NCM issues advisory
summary_full: Get ready for a weather change! The UAE anticipates light rain, strong winds, and rough seas next week, shifting from current fair conditions. Authorities urge caution for outdoor and marine activities due to reduced visibility from dust and sand. Stay updated with NCM advisories as unsettled weather approaches.
